title: Finally… A NotebookLM Alternative With an API
summary: Open Notebook is a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM that provides developers with control over document processing, code, and AI workflows through an API. The tool supports adding sources, grounded question answering, and podcast generation from documents.
writeup: This Better Stack video covers Open Notebook, a self-hosted, open-source alternative to Google NotebookLM that exposes its functionality through an API. It matters because developers gain control over document processing, code, and AI workflows rather than relying on a closed hosted service. The concrete takeaways: the tool supports adding sources, grounded question answering, and podcast generation from documents.
